name: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Illegal TCP Flag Combination
notes: This Building Block identifies flows that have an illegal TCP flag combination.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Illegal TCP Flag Combination on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the source TCP flags are any of SR, SF, FUP, FUPSAR78, SRAFU
when the source packets is equal to 1
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Suspicious IP Protocol Usage: Illegal TCP Flag Combination on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source TCP flags are any of SR, SF, FUP, FUPSAR78, SRAFU
AND when the source packets is equal to 1
